next_steps: Upper endoscopy (EGD) to evaluate for peptic ulcer disease and gastric outflow obstruction
Evaluation for occult gastrointestinal bleeding given persistent anemia
Cessation of all cannabis use to exclude cannabinoid hyperemesis syndrome
Consultation with pediatric gastroenterology for consideration of motility studies
Upper endoscopy (EGD) with biopsies for H. pylori and celiac disease
Measure serum inflammatory markers (ESR, CRP) and fecal calprotectin
Obtain iron studies (ferritin, iron, TIBC) and peripheral blood smear
Consult pediatric gastroenterology for possible motility evaluation
